summary.original_text:
Fashion professional with 3+ years of experience in buying, merchandising, category management, and P&L management
across retail and e-commerce. Experienced in assortment planning, vendor sourcing, PO/PI coordination, and product
lifecycle execution for apparel categories including bottom-wear, casualwear, and accessories. Proven ability to analyze
sales performance, optimize assortments, negotiate supplier terms, and improve margins and sell-through across multi-
channel retail environments.
summary.rewritten_text: Entrepreneurial fashion merchandiser with relevant experience in buying, merchandising, category management, and P&L management across omnichannel retail. Drives assortment planning, vendor sourcing, PO/PI coordination, and product lifecycle execution for apparel categories including bottom-wear, casualwear, and accessories. Analyzes sales performance to optimize assortments, negotiate supplier terms, and improve margins and sell-through.
summary.change_reason: Positioned as entrepreneurial merchandiser driving category growth, aligning with builder narrative while emphasizing data-driven assortment planning and vendor negotiation.
